top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.PT IS NOT NULL AND l.PT != 'Normal' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) 
    - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.PT IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female_abnormal_PT
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) 
    - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) > 55
    AND l.PT IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.PT IS NOT NULL AND l.PT != 'Normal' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) 
    - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.PT IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female_abnormal_PT
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) 
    - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) > 55
    AND l.PT IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.PT > 1.2 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.PT IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS percentage_female_abnormal_PT
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) 
    - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) > 55
    AND l.PT IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.PT IS NOT NULL AND l.PT != 'Normal' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) 
    - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.PT IS NOT NULL AND l.PT != 'Normal' THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / 
        COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END), 
        2
    ) AS percentage_female_abnormal_PT
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) > 55
    AND p.SEX = 'F';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.PT IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female_abnormal_PT
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) 
    - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) > 55
    AND l.PT IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.PT IS NOT NULL AND l.PT != 'Normal' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) 
    - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) > 55;
